calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared via zoom for Conrado Atento (petitioner).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the client was successful on depositing fees to the estate account. Petition for final distribution is taken under submission. Counsel to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Xiao: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kury Huysentruyt appeared via zoom for Conrado Atento (executor).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that the personal representative was having issues raising funds to open an account and is requesting some more time. Petition for final distribution on waiver of account etc., is continued to November 15, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt, via Zoom, for Conrado R. Atento, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges the efforts described in the recently filed declarations and advises that it is satisfied with the efforts that the parties have made to determine the location of additional heirs.

No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-29-1996 is admitted to probate. Conrado R. Atento is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-05-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt, via Zoom, for Conrado Atento, Petitioner.

Mr. Huysentruyt reports regarding the delay with this matter and requests a continuance to clear the Examiner's notes. The court reminds counsel that this matter has previously been continued five (5) times and summarizes the pending issues with this matter including correcting the court's address on the DE-121 form; identifying the personal representative of Flora Atento's estate and provide a copy of Letters if applicable, if not, advising whether Flora Atento died intestate or testate; notice to decedent's husband Bernardo Jerlaban; and file a Declaration to describe efforts to locate heirs as required by CRC 7.52(a).

The matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
